# Family — Your favorite crypto wallet

> Exported from https://family.co/ on 2026-07-16

Explore Ethereum with the best wallet for iOS. Interacting with crypto has never been so simple.

**Download on iOS** · **Watch the Video**

---

## App Demo (animation)

The homepage hero cycles through live app demos for **Send**, **Receive**, and **Swap** features, shown inside iPhone mockups.

![Family app demo animation showing Send, Receive, and Swap features](./family-home-app-demo.gif)

---

## Explore Ethereum in a whole new way

- **Send** — Send tokens or collectibles to any address or ENS username.
- **Swap** — Swap your tokens without ever leaving your wallet.
- **Receive** — Receive Ethereum-based assets through your unique address.
- **Purchase** — Purchase crypto instantly through your bank account. *(ID Required)*

### Core qualities

- **Easy** — Whether you're a beginner or seasoned pro, Family makes it easy.
- **Secure** — Your crypto, your control. Security at every stage.
- **Fast** — Uncompromising speed. Optimal performance, all the time (~60 secs).
- **Powerful** — Experience the full power of Ethereum with advanced features.
- **Fun** — Family takes fun seriously. Delightful interactions with every tap.

---

## Send, receive, swap — All in one place

### Send & Receive
Flawless essentials. Easily send tokens and collectibles with the fewest taps, or share your wallet address by simply scanning a personalized QR code to receive new assets.

### Decentralized Swaps
Trade thousands of tokens with minimal fees, 24/7. Family ensures optimal prices from various exchanges so you can acquire the tokens you want, whenever you want them.

### Full NFT Support
Experience NFTs in their intended format with full rich media support. Interact with everything, including video, audio, images, and interactive content.

### WalletConnect Enabled
Easily access decentralized apps with WalletConnect in Family. Pair your wallet with the built-in scanner and enjoy seamless connectivity across web3.

### Self-Custody
Family delivers robust security with flexibility. The self-custodial wallet prioritizes your control, giving you direct access to your private keys and sensitive data at all times.

### Maximum Privacy
Explore web3 on your own terms. Family works with or without an email or phone number, letting you choose the experience that's right for you.

---

## Seamless — The best way to experience NFTs

View NFTs in their ideal intended format. Full rich media support no matter the type: Images, Video, 3D Models, Audio, Interactive Models, and AR Models.

![Manage your collectibles](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

---

## Simple — Watch the wallets you care about

Keep up to date with unlimited wallets in view-only mode by entering an address or ENS name, and get real-time notifications on any new activity.

- Watch Any Wallet
- Rich Notifications
- Fully Customizable

![Watching wallets](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

---

## Understandable — Wallet activity you can understand

Your transactions and wallet history are readable at a glance. No more deciphering confusing events with weird names — Family does that for you.

- Human-Readable Activity
- Real-Time Monitoring
- Custom Filtering

![Wallet activity](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

---

## Secure — Relentless protection. Restful ease.

Family is fully self-custodial, meaning only you have access to your wallet and its private keys. We have no control over your crypto, nor do we want any.

- Self-Custody
- Own Your Keys
- No Name Required
- No Lock-In
- Fully Audited

---

## Effortless onboarding. Masterful management.

- **Onboarding**
- **Mission Control**
- **Drag and Drop**

---

## The latest from Family

### The Crypto Wallet Problem – Why We Created Family Accounts
*Published 13 May, 2025*

![The Crypto Wallet Problem – Why We Created Family Accounts](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Traditional wallets rely on seed phrases and private keys, but this approach has fundamental flaws. Losing access to your bank account because you misplaced a single piece of information would be unthinkable — yet in crypto, this remains a common reality. Most users struggle with managing seed phrases and private keys, often resorting to insecure storage methods like screenshots or digital notes.

### Making Family Simpler & Safer
*Published 2 April, 2025*

![Making Family Simpler & Safer](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

A major upgrade to Family — designed to make onboarding and navigating Ethereum simpler and safer than ever. Born from the team's own need for seamless yet secure crypto experiences, these features offer an easy path to getting onchain.

---

## Details that matter

We sweat the details, no matter how small.

- **Monitor In Real-Time** — Track the status of all your transactions in real-time, with live updates, detailed information, notifications, and seamless animations between states (e.g. Transaction → Analyzing → Safe). You'll be the first to know when your transactions go through. *(~ 1000 USDC example)*
- **Protect Your Assets** — Understand your transactions before you send them and receive warnings about potentially harmful actions. Get full protection over all your assets, with help from advanced simulations and suggested actions. *(e.g. Ethereum $3,080.00 / 1.54 ETH; USDC $41.00 / 41.00 USDC)*
- **Organise Your Wallet** — Take full control with powerful organization across all assets. Rearrange tokens and collectibles, star favorites, or move things to the trash for spring-cleaning.
- **See Everything Clearly** — Crystal clear breakdowns of your wallets and their groupings. Whether you have two wallets or two hundred, Family provides a bird's eye view into your entire setup with unmatched clarity.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is Family safe?**
Yes. Only you have access to your credentials and, consequently, your wallet and its assets. Family also employs several security measures including requiring 2FA via biometrics for sensitive actions such as signing transactions. Family has been audited by Zellic, a leading security firm.

**Can I switch from another wallet?**
Yes. If you're using a non-custodial wallet like Phantom or MetaMask and want to keep your current wallet addresses, you can import your existing wallet(s) into Family using your Secret Recovery Phrase or Private Key. Guides are available for importing from MetaMask and from Phantom.

**What networks does Family support?**
Family currently supports Ethereum mainnet, as well as Layer 2 networks (L2s) including Optimism, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, and zkSync, with more to come.

---

## Explore Family

Family is a beautiful self-custody Ethereum wallet designed to make crypto easy for everyone.

**Download for iOS**
